USAddress.AddressLine1Txt: DEPT OF PSYCHOLOGY UNIV OF CAL LOS

SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: VISITING SCHOLAR PROGRAM - FIFTEEN FULL YEAR SCHOLARS, TWO HALF-YEAR SCHOLARS, AND ONE HALF-YEAR JOURNALIST WERE PROVIDED WITH OFFICES AT THE FOUNDATION TO CONDUCT RESEARCH, HOLD MEETINGS & CONDUCT SEMINARS ON VARIOUS SOCIAL SCIENCE TOPICS.
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description2Txt: RESEARCH PROJECTS PROGRAM - PROVIDED DIRECT SUPPORT OF SOCIAL SCIENCE RESEARCH WORKING WITH VARIOUS UNIVERSITIES. ACTIVITY ALSO INCLUDES DEVELOPMENT COSTS RELATED TO EVALUATION AND EXPANSION OF POTENTIAL RESEARCH IN SOCIAL SCIENCE DISCIPLINES.
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description3Txt: PUBLICATIONS - PUBLISHED SEVEN BOOKS AND SIX JOURNAL ISSUES DURING THE FISCAL YEAR ON VARIOUS TOPICS IN SOCIAL SCIENCE.

ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.FormAndInfoAndMaterialsTxt: CHECK THE FOUNDATION'S WEBSITE FOR FORMS, DEADLINES AND RESTRICTIONS.
